title: Fluffy Charred Irish Potato Roast
description: A hearty Irish dish featuring charred and fluffy potatoes, perfect for a comforting meal, made in a copper mug with vegetable stock for added flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the sliced potatoes with 2 tablespoons of olive oil, salt, black pepper, and garlic powder until they are evenly coated.

In a copper mug, arrange a layer of potatoes, followed by a layer of sliced onion, chopped carrots, and chopped parsnips, repeating this process until all ingredients are used, ending with a layer of potatoes on top.
Pour the vegetable stock over the potatoes and vegetables in the copper mug.
Drizzle the remaining olive oil over the top layer of potatoes.
Cover the copper mug with aluminum foil and roast in the preheated oven for 45 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue roasting for an additional 30 minutes, or until the potatoes are golden brown and charred.
Remove the copper mug from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Sprinkle the fresh thyme sprigs over the top of the potatoes and serve hot.
